description: Fragment of power of attorney signed by four persons including the judge Shemuel b. Saadya (in office 1165-1203) and deputy judge Jephthah b. Yaʿaqov (in office 1182-1219). Dated to the last quarter of 12th century. (Information from Goitein's index cards and Mediterranean Society, II, pp. 124, 546.) Looks like the hand of the court scribe Yosef b. Shemuel b. Seʿadya ha-Levi (c. 1181–1209).
tags: Yosef b. Shemuel, power of attorney
